headline: Elon Musk Bets On Human Workforce As AI, Robotics Boost Productivity: 'Basically Just Issue Money…'
summary: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk has shared that the automaker will expand its human workforce as artificial intelligence and robotics advancements boost productivity. Tesla To Add Workers On Thursday, Business Insider cited Musk’s comments at the Abundance Summit, where the billionaire shared that Tesla wasn't planning any layoffs, instead focusing on expanding its workforce because the "output per human at Tesla” was going to “get nutty high," he said.
